name: Villainess
description: Sara is an ordinary modern day girl. That is until she is hit by a car and dies. She is reincarnated in a fantasy novel called "Beauty and the Beasts". She is reincarnated as the villainess of the story, Lily Von Scheild. In the original story, Lily the villainess dies miserably after trying to poison the female protagonist, Alishia. Sara who is not the actual villainess decides to change her fate. Will she be able to do so?
creator: Lamia2005
